title: AMQP 0-9-1 Model, Virtual Hosts, Exchanges, Queues, and Bindings · Mastery Check
summary: A production review compares near-miss TypeScript messaging decisions for amqp 0-9-1 model, virtual hosts, exchanges, queues, and bindings and requires the smallest defensible AMQP entity and routing graph with changed-case evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for AMQP entity and routing graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Amqp Entity Model · changed case · Quiz Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz messaging team handles case 9033 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; retain duplicate-safe identity through every ambiguous handoff; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

checks.description: The decision applies Amqp Error Scope to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Amqp Error Scope.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using classify and connection plus specific case evidence.
